document.masterDocTitle: A New Species Of The Genus Himalopsyche (Trichoptera, Rhyacophilidae), With Keys To And Catalogue Of Indian Species

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: A New Species Of The Genus Himalopsyche (Trichoptera, Rhyacophilidae), With Keys To And Catalogue Of Indian Species

subSubSection.paragraph:
According to Schmid & Botosaneanu (1966) this group contains species with characters with symmetrical male anterior claws, male apicodorsal lobe of segment IX present, male preanal appendages small, male anal sclerite long and mobile, phallic apparatus complete, and male maxillary palps thicker than in species of the
H . tibetana
group.

heading.emphasis:
Subgroups of the
H. kuldschensis
group

subSubSection.paragraph: This group has been further divided into two subgroups which can be easily separated from each other.

paragraph.keyLead:
3. Segment VIII completely divided into tergum and sternum. .............................
H. kuldschensis
subgroup

— Segment VIII partly divided into tergum and sternum. .........................................
H. angnorbui
subgroup

heading.emphasis:
Indian species of the
H. kuldschensis
subgroup

Key to Indian species of the
H. kuldschensis
subgroup

paragraph.keyLead: 2. Inferior appendages with terminal part not globose (spherical)...................................................................3

3. Anal sclerite apically bifid in dorsal view. ................................................................
H. todma Schmid, 1963

4. Segment X with median lobes almost completely fused; anal sclerite with long root invaginated to half of segment IX. ....................................................................................................
H. dolmasampa Schmid, 1963

— Segment X with median lobes fused to 2/3rds of their length; anal sclerite with short root not invaginated into segment IX. ........................................................................................
H. malenanda Schmid, 1963

5. Segment IX large, forming roof over segment X. .............................................
H. bhagirathi Schmid, 1963

7. Phallic parameres with strong apical spines...........................................................
H. yongma Schmid, 1963

— Phallic parameres without such spines. .............................................................
H. yatrawalla Schmid, 1966

8. Segment X with each paired dorsal lobe thin and fingerlike. ..............................
H. lungma Schmid, 1963

— Segment X with each paired dorsal lobe almost fused. ...........................................
H. gyamo Schmid, 1963

9. Segment VIII with patch of small thick setae near posterior margin. ..........
H. malenanda Schmid, 1963

10. Posterior apex of vaginal apparatus indented. .........................................................
H. todma Schmid, 1963

14. Segment IX with apodemes extending anteriorly to segment VII. .......................
H. gyamo Schmid, 1963
— Segment IX apodemes extending anteriorly to middle of segment VIII...................................................15

— Anterior margin of segment VIII without projection. .........................................
H. lungma Schmid, 1963
